title: erythroxylum spruceanum
intro: Erythroxylum spruceanum is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae, commonly known as the Spruce's coca or Ecuadorian coca. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Erythroxylum spruceanum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as supporting respiratory health and reducing stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically dried and used as a tea or tincture, or added to infusions and blends for its medicinal properties.
